→ SCENARIO?

"Since I was young, I had a life predetermined for me." Michael Kaiser—the glorious Emperor of Blumen—takes you in as his spouse after your kingdom loses a war against his army. Meanwhile, you stayed abroad until your parents urged you to return which cost your freedom.
